mentions.note: Down 25% in 2 months despite EPS forecast to triple YoY. Oil spike risk real but estimates already slashed to $2.86 (still 3x last year). Elliott activist driving turnaround; possible acquisition target at bargain valuation.
Caller Billy asked about 'Hasty Drop Airlines' (likely Southwest or another carrier); Cramer says don't go into the lion's den; prefer Nvidia instead.
Stunning quarter; stock up nearly 19%; full-year EPS guidance more than quadruple; new policies (assigned seats, bag fees) working; CEO cooperating with Elliott Management activism.
